creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192586
py-ciscoconfparse-1.3.12.

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-ciscoconfparse to 1.3.12. 

Changes by upstream:
- Upgrade comparisons of IPv4Obj and IPv6Obj (see also: https://github.com/mpenning/ciscoconfparse/blob/master/CHANGES)

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
